mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SY_GLOBAL_NAME WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY ORDERNO, NO, LANGUAGE
SELECT * FROM SY_GLOBAL_NAME WHERE NO = #{no} AND LANGUAGE = #{language}
SELECT CONTENT FROM SY_GLOBAL_NAME WHERE NO = #{no} AND LANGUAGE = #{language}
mapper.update: UPDATE SY_GLOBAL_NAME SET CONTENT = #{content}, UPDATE_DATE = sysdate, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ACTIVITY = #{activity}, ORDERNO = #{orderNo} WHERE SEQ = #{seq}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SY_GLOBAL_NAME WHERE NO = #{no} AND LANGUAGE = #{language}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT NO FROM SY_GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY NO
SELECT DISTINCT LANGUAGE FROM SY_GLOBAL_NAME ORDER BY LANGUAGE
